summary: Enthusiastic fan report of an unforgettable concert with a beloved recording that captures the relaxed second set and unique Dylan collaboration.
review: The reviewer, who attended the show, describes it as “excellent” and highlights the rare moment when the Dead played together with Bob Dylan, calling it unforgettably special. While no technical details are given, they express love for the recording, implying it meets their expectations despite the lack of specific audio commentary.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic review; strong positive sentiment about the performance but no concrete recording details, so rating reflects a good show with an assumed decent recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer simply says “Love the recording!” without mentioning clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as cramped (“sardines”), second set more relaxed; special mention of the Dylan collaboration making the show unique.
